title: DGB - Recover Digibyte (DGB) sent to Doge (DOGE)

actions.value:
1. To start this process please have a PC or laptop available and visit https://iancoleman.io/bip39/ (You will use this to access your funds).
  2. To export your Doge private key, go to your wallet main screen by tapping wallets located at the bottom right of your app screen.
  3. Tap on your Doge coin wallet to go inside of it. Once inside of the wallet, tap on the gear icon (located on the upper right side of screen). A new menu will pop up and then you will tap on View Master Private Seed and enter your password and your seed will be displaed.
  4. Take your seed (Called the mnemonic phrase.) and type it into the box labeled "BIP39 Mnemonic" on the website https://iancoleman.io/bip39/
  5. Now look for the field labeled "Coin" and set that to Doge.
  6. Now scroll down to the section of the website labeled "Derived Addresses" (It will be the section following Derivation Path).
  7. There will be a table that shows four fields "Path, Address, Public Key, and Private Key" from here mouse over "Private Key" to reveal a QR code. You will use these to sweep your funds.
  8. Now open your Edge app and create a Digibyte wallet, from the wallets main screen tap the "+" sign to the left of the screen to create the wallet.  After pressing the "+" you can type Digi and then tap that wallet.
  9. Once the wallet is created tap the menu icon located at the upper right of the screen and then tap "Sweep Private Key".
  10. At the top of the screen tap the wallet that is shown to make sure you have Digibyte selected. After tapping the top of the screen you can then select Digibyte.
  11. Now point your camera at the revealed QR code that is shown when you mouse over "Private Key". 

You will need to reveal each "Private Key" QR code and repeat steps 9 through 11 until you have all  of the funds that you're missing. 

Please let me know if you have any further questions.

raw_title: DGB - Recover Digibyte (DGB) sent to Doge (DOGE)
